title: Jouni Uski
text: Home * People * Jouni Uski Jouni Uski , a Finnish chess and computer chess aficionado. He is tester, collector of test-positions , frequent poster in computer chess forums , and long term member in CCC , with interests in all aspects of chess engines , tournaments and mate solving [1] . In 1996 he reported on the Human vs. Computer Match in Finland, 1996 [2] .
